## [plugin] Plugin Submission & Updates

Use this template only for plugin metadata submissions and update.

---

## Plugin Information

- Plugin name:
- Repository URL:
- License:
- Maintainer/author:
- Short description:

---

## Submission Type

- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] Metadata update
- [ ] Version update
- [ ] Fix existing plugin entry
- [ ] Remove plugin

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The plugin repository is public and accessible
- [ ] The metadata is accurate and up to date
- [ ] The declared license is valid
- [ ] The plugin is not malicious to the best of my knowledge
- [ ] The plugin does not require undocumented unsafe behavior
- [ ] I understand that plugin runtime issues belong in the plugin repository, not this registry repository
